utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross , get over it ! It is not like she hates you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross , she is not weird , she just wants her stuff to be one of a kind .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Huh . You know what not one of a kind ? A twin !

emotion_cause.span: 3_she just wants her stuff to be one of a kind .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ooh , Phoebe here ! Okay , let turn out all the lights and we will just watch the movie !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Phoebe here ! Okay , let turn out all the lights and we will just watch the movie !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , you like it ? You wanna know where I got it ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: He got it a flea market !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You bought your sheets at a flea market ? Ross come on , you gotta loosen the purse strings a little .

emotion_cause.span: 10_You bought your sheets at a flea market ?
